input.user_input: I represent an undocumented immigrant client facing deportation. Can you draft a brief summary of available defenses and legal remedies under current immigration law?

actual: When representing an undocumented client in removal proceedings, there are several potential defenses and forms of relief available under U.S. immigration law. The viability of each depends heavily on the client
